---
title: "Research"
description: "Original MLB reporting and analysis from The SABRhood."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">Original reporting</span>

# Research and features

Long-form baseball analysis grounded in reproducible data work. Each story starts with a question about the game and ends with evidence readers can follow.
:::

::: {.service-grid}
::: {.service-card}
<span class="eyebrow">June 29, 2026</span>

## Caleb Durbin is Digging Deep

There is a heat wave in Boston, centralized entirely in Caleb Durbin's bat.

[Read the story →](posts/durbin_article.html)
:::

::: {.service-card}
<span class="eyebrow">June 10, 2026</span>

## Breaking Down Bello

A pitch-level look at Brayan Bello's arsenal, results, and changing approach.

[Read the story →](posts/bello_article_final.html)
:::

::: {.service-card}
<span class="eyebrow">May 12, 2026</span>

## A.J. Ewing Gets the Call

What the data said when one of Boston's prospects reached the majors.

[Read the story →](posts/A.J%20Ewing%20Gets%20the%20Call.html)
:::

::: {.service-card}
<span class="eyebrow">April 21, 2026</span>

## Series Rundown: Tigers at Red Sox

A research-driven recap of the matchups and turning points at Fenway Park.

[Read the story →](posts/Series%20Recap%20Tigers%20Sox.html)
:::

::: {.service-card}
<span class="eyebrow">March 26, 2026</span>

## The Halos Need a Hail Mary

José Soriano's arsenal and the risk embedded in the Angels' rotation.

[Read the story →](posts/sorianopreseason26.html)
:::

::: {.service-card}
<span class="eyebrow">February 26, 2026</span>

## Ceddanne's New Groove

How Ceddanne Rafaela's swing decisions and batted-ball profile were changing.

[Read the story →](posts/ceddannesnewgroove.html)
:::
:::
